# Source quality rubric

| Level | Source type | Use |
|---|---|---|
| A | Official platform docs, peer-reviewed studies, established methodology references | Foundation for mechanisms and methods |
| B | Industry benchmark reports with visible methodology | Hypothesis generation |
| C | Creator anecdotes, agency blogs, informal claims | Inspiration only |
| D | Viral folklore with no evidence | Do not treat as evidence |

## Rule

A tactic enters the experiment queue only when it is tied to:

```text
a behavioural mechanism
a platform metric
a test method
a decision rule
```
